$comment: Schema version migration table: schema_version 1 = Stages 1-3; schema_version 2 = Stage 4 (adds backward_routing_count, backward_routing_count_by_target_phase, in_flight_backward_edge, mode_transitions); schema_version 3 = Stage 5 (adds lrr_cycle_state); schema_version 4 = Stage 6 (adds current_sprint_context_hash), schema_version 5 = Stage 7 (adds feature_delegation_plan_path, current_wave, completed_features, feature_acceptance, feature_briefs), schema_version 6 = Stage 8 (adds phase_summaries). --- Runtime validation rules (not encodable in JSON Schema, require code): Rule 5 — step prefix must match current phase number; Rule 6 — mode/autonomous consistency (mode==='autonomous' iff autonomous===true); Rule 7 — iOS fields gating (app_name, bundle_id, xcodeproj_path, ios_features, phase_progress.phase_minus_1 exist iff project_type==='ios'); Rule 10 — pending/in-progress disjoint (in_progress_task.task_id not in pending_tasks or completed_tasks); Rule 11 — resume_point.phase/step must not be ahead of top-level phase/step; Rule 12 — timestamps monotonic (session_last_saved >= session_started).
title: .build-state.json
description: Typed source of truth for BuildAnything build state. Validated by the PreToolUse schema lint hook (W2-2). additionalProperties: false enforces fail-closed per A8 SSOT rule.

in_flight_backward_edge.$comment: Stage 4+ (schema_version >= 2). Written atomically with counter increment on backward-route dispatch. Cleared by target phase on re-entry. Stale edges (>60s) trigger counter decrement on --resume.

mode_transition.$comment: Stage 4+ (schema_version >= 2). Records SDK/markdown flag-flip events. Each entry captures which flag changed, the prior and new values, a full post-flip snapshot of all tracked flags, the session_id when known, and a timestamp.

post_flags.description: Snapshot of all tracked flag values AFTER this flip.

schema_version.description: Currently 5 (Stage 7). Bumped to 2 at Stage 4, 3 at Stage 5, 4 at Stage 6, 5 at Stage 7.

phase.description: Current phase. -1 is iOS bootstrap only.

step.description: Dotted step identifier within the phase (e.g. '5.3b', '6.4', '-1.1').

session_id.description: UUID generated at session start; stable across compactions within a session.

session_started.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the current session began.

session_last_saved.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent state write. Must be >= session_started.

autonomous.description: Whether --autonomous was passed. Must agree with mode field.

build_request.description: Original user prompt that initiated the build.

context_level.description: Richness of the initial context provided.

pending_tasks.description: task_ids still to be dispatched. May be empty [].

phase_artifacts.description: Paths to persisted phase outputs. All properties optional; empty {} is valid.

metric_loop_history.description: Scored iterations across all phases. May be empty [].

dispatch_counter.description: Used by the 'save every N dispatches' heuristic.

phase_progress.description: Boolean per phase. phase_minus_1 is optional (iOS only).

resume_point.description: Snapshot used by Phase-0 resume logic.

ios_features.description: iOS only. Exactly 16 boolean feature flags.

in_progress_task.description: Task currently executing. Present only while a task is in flight.

active_metric_loop.description: Present only while a metric loop is running. Removed when loop completes.

decisions_pruned_at_phase0.description: Set to true after Phase 0 archives stale decision rows from previous builds

decisions_next_id.description: Keyed by phase number string. Integer values = next sequence. Deprecated under Stage 2 (scribe owns ID allocation); scheduled for removal at Stage 4 A7.

backward_routing_count.description: Stage 4+ (schema_version >= 2). Per-decision backward routing counter: decision_id -> count.

backward_routing_count_by_target_phase.description: Stage 4+ (schema_version >= 2). Per-target-phase backward routing counter: phase -> count.

in_flight_backward_edge.description: Stage 4+ (schema_version >= 2). Present only while a backward-routing edge is in flight.

lrr_cycle_state.description: Stage 5+ (schema_version >= 3). LRR cycle state and aggregator output fields.

current_sprint_context_hash.description: Stage 6+ (schema_version >= 4). Hash of sprint-scoped shared context; triggers re-render only on sprint boundary.

feature_delegation_plan_path.$comment: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Populated at Phase 4 Step 4.1 by product-owner agent.
feature_delegation_plan_path.description: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Path to feature-delegation-plan.json written by Product Owner in Phase 4 Step 4.1.

current_wave.$comment: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Initialized to 1 at Step 4.1; incremented by orchestrator at Step 4.4.
current_wave.description: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Current wave number in the feature-delegation plan.

completed_features.$comment: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Append-only. Set by orchestrator after product-owner ACCEPTED verdict.
completed_features.description: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Feature names accepted by Product Owner.

feature_acceptance.$comment: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Written by orchestrator after each product-owner acceptance dispatch (Step 4.3).
feature_acceptance.description: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Product Owner acceptance verdict per feature.

feature_briefs.$comment: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Written by orchestrator after each briefing-officer dispatch (Step 4.2.a).
feature_briefs.description: Stage 7+ (schema_version >= 5). Map of feature name to feature brief file path (docs/plans/feature-briefs/{feature}.md).

phase_summaries.$comment: Stage 8+ (schema_version >= 6). Written by orchestrator at each phase boundary per the Context Budget Protocol.
phase_summaries.description: Stage 8+ (schema_version >= 6). Structured carry-forward summaries from completed phases. Max ~500 tokens per entry.
